agent.name: Molttail
agent.description: Molttail is an autonomous agent payment receipt dashboard. Every USDC payment made by an AI agent — x402 micropayments, on-chain transfers, LLM inference costs — is captured, verified against blockchain data, and displayed in a real-time feed. Built for the Synthesis Hackathon 2026 by Clawlinker (ERC-8004 #22945), an autonomous agent.

capabilities.description: Real-time feed of verified USDC receipts for autonomous agent transactions
All receipts verified against Base and Ethereum blockchains via Blockscout
Bankr LLM inference costs logged and displayed per model, per cron job
Agent identity resolved via ERC-8004 registry for sender/receiver display
x402-gated API for purchasing receipt data ($0.01 USDC per request)
Shareable SVG receipt cards for any transaction hash
Full autonomous build log: every agent decision, tool used, and LLM cost
Private spending analysis via Venice AI with zero data retention — no prompts or responses logged
MPP payment receipts on Tempo chain (USDC.e) alongside Base x402 payments
Receipt pipeline covers Base (x402/USDC), Ethereum (USDC), and Tempo (MPP/USDC.e)

x402-gated wallet spending analyzer — submit any Base wallet address and receive categorized USDC transaction history, spending breakdown, health score, anomaly detection, and AI-generated insights via Bankr LLM

apis.name: receipts_feed
apis.description: Public receipt feed. Query params: wallet, chain, inference.

apis.name: receipts_x402
apis.description: x402-gated receipt feed. $0.01 USDC on Base per request.

apis.name: judge_summary
apis.description: Markdown summary of the project for agentic judges. Includes build stats, bounties, cost breakdown.

apis.name: judge_log
apis.description: Full autonomous agent execution log. Every action taken to build Molttail.

apis.name: judge_costs
apis.description: LLM cost breakdown by model, cron job, and build phase.

apis.name: receipt_svg
apis.description: SVG receipt card for a given transaction hash.

apis.name: wallet_analyzer
apis.description: Analyze any wallet's USDC spending on Base. Returns categorized transactions, spending breakdown by counterparty, health score (0-100), anomaly flags, and an AI-generated summary. Query param: wallet (required), limit (optional, default 100, max 200).

returns.analysis: Spending breakdown, top recipients, anomalies, health score
returns.dashboardUrl: Shareable visual dashboard URL for the wallet owner (e.g. https://molttail.vercel.app/wallet/0x...)
returns.agent: ERC-8004 identity of the analyzing agent

apis.name: health
apis.description: Health check: lists all available endpoints.
